title: I was giving my coding agent context the wrong way...
summary: AI Jason discusses an improved approach to context provision for coding agents, addressing a common setup mistake. The video covers codebase harness and skill setup from the AI Builder Club repository.
writeup: AI Jason revisits how context gets supplied to coding agents, identifying a common setup mistake and laying out an improved approach. The video walks through codebase harness and skill setup drawn from the AI Builder Club repository. The core focus is context management for AI agents and the configuration choices that affect how well an agent works against a codebase.
